pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which enforce and expect this specific output path.
Verified by reviewing export_result.sh which parses max rise/fall rates directly from this specific file.
Verified via task_utils.sh where MUNCIE_DIR is hardcoded to this path.

privileged_info_summary: The correct output_csv path is /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/stage_change_rates.csv and output_summary path is /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_results/stage_change_summary.txt. The HEC-RAS project directory is /home/ga/Documents/hec_ras_projects/Muncie. Executing the HEC-RAS Unsteady simulation on the Muncie dataset (producing Muncie.p04.hdf) and independently computing derivatives of the water surface elevations yields 61 total cross-sections. The overall maximum rise rate across all cross-sections is ~3.48 ft/hr, and the overall maximum fall rate is ~0.54 ft/hr.
